_comment: Real profile for Mahathir Mohammad — configured for strict single-page ATS compilation.
name: Mahathir Mohammad
summary: Full Stack JavaScript Developer with hands-on experience building scalable web applications using the MERN stack (React.js, Next.js, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB). Skilled in developing SaaS platforms, e-commerce applications, and role-based management dashboards with clean code and high performance.

projects.name: FoodFlow — Food Sharing & Surplus Platform
bullets: Built a food donation platform connecting food donors with communities to minimize food waste.
Implemented real-time request tracking, food availability listings, and secure user authentication.

projects.name: Blood Donation Application (SaaS)
bullets: Implemented role-based dashboards for donors, volunteers, and administrators across 3 distinct tiers.
Built secure authentication system using Firebase, protecting all API routes and user sessions.

projects.name: Volans Clothing E-Commerce
projects.technologies: Next.js 15, JavaScript, MongoDB, NextAuth.js, GSAP, Tailwind CSS
bullets: Built with Next.js 15 App Router enabling server-side rendering and optimized page performance.
Developed a secure Admin Dashboard for product catalog management and order processing.

projects.name: Community Cleanliness & Camp Platform
bullets: Developed user authentication and event management features for tracking community campaigns.
